seoTitle: Mount Austin vs Mount Burrell — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Austin and Mount Burrell. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Austin vs Mount Burrell: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Austin and Mount Burrell.
heading: Mount Austin vs Mount Burrell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Austin, New South Wales and Mount Burrell, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Burrell has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Mount Austin (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Austin or Mount Burrell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Austin has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Mount Burrell scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Austin scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Burrell scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Austin or Mount Burrell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Burrell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
